defaultIsolation: state reset per interaction; tenant/user/aggregate/cache data scoped by verification run id

states.name: command-accepted
states.setup: Seed tenant-contract-a, user-contract-a, order-1, and accept ShipOrderCommand.
states.teardown: Clear seeded command inbox and status resource for the run.
states.testOnlySeam: Provider-state HTTP endpoint or fixture command in the EventStore submodule

states.name: command-validation-failure
states.setup: Reject ShipOrderCommand with bounded validation ProblemDetails.
states.teardown: No persisted state; reset validation fixture.
states.testOnlySeam: Provider-state HTTP endpoint or fixture command in the EventStore submodule

states.name: command-unauthorized
states.setup: Run without an accepted bearer context.
states.testOnlySeam: Provider-state HTTP endpoint or fixture command in the EventStore submodule

states.name: command-forbidden
states.setup: Seed tenant-contract-a but deny the command policy/resource.
states.testOnlySeam: Provider-state HTTP endpoint or fixture command in the EventStore submodule

states.name: command-not-found
states.setup: Seed tenant-contract-a with missing aggregate order-missing.
states.testOnlySeam: Provider-state HTTP endpoint or fixture command in the EventStore submodule

states.name: command-conflict
states.setup: Seed order-1 in a conflicting version/state.
states.testOnlySeam: Provider-state HTTP endpoint or fixture command in the EventStore submodule

states.name: command-rate-limited
states.setup: Seed per-tenant throttle bucket above limit.
states.testOnlySeam: Provider-state HTTP endpoint or fixture command in the EventStore submodule

states.name: command-unexpected-5xx
states.setup: Force provider test seam to return bounded synthetic server failure.
states.testOnlySeam: Provider-state HTTP endpoint or fixture command in the EventStore submodule

states.name: tenant-mismatch
states.setup: Seed authenticated tenant Tenant_Contract_Case and reject cross-tenant access.
states.testOnlySeam: Provider-state HTTP endpoint or fixture command in the EventStore submodule

states.name: query-fresh-data
states.setup: Seed projection row order-1 for tenant-contract-a.
states.teardown: Clear projection row and ETag cache.
states.testOnlySeam: Provider-state HTTP endpoint or fixture command in the EventStore submodule

states.name: query-empty-result
states.setup: Seed tenant-contract-a with no projection rows.
states.testOnlySeam: Provider-state HTTP endpoint or fixture command in the EventStore submodule

states.name: query-malformed-payload
states.setup: Reject malformed query request with bounded ProblemDetails.
states.testOnlySeam: Provider-state HTTP endpoint or fixture command in the EventStore submodule

states.name: query-forbidden
states.setup: Seed tenant-contract-a but deny projection read.
states.testOnlySeam: Provider-state HTTP endpoint or fixture command in the EventStore submodule

states.name: query-not-found
states.testOnlySeam: Provider-state HTTP endpoint or fixture command in the EventStore submodule

states.name: query-rate-limited
states.setup: Seed per-tenant query throttle bucket above limit.
states.testOnlySeam: Provider-state HTTP endpoint or fixture command in the EventStore submodule

states.name: query-etag-match
states.setup: Seed order-1 projection and matching ETag cache validator.
states.teardown: Clear projection row and cache validator.
states.testOnlySeam: Provider-state HTTP endpoint or fixture command in the EventStore submodule

states.name: query-etag-no-cache
states.setup: Seed matching provider ETag but require caller-owned cache handling.
states.testOnlySeam: Provider-state HTTP endpoint or fixture command in the EventStore submodule

states.name: query-large-valid-metadata
states.setup: Seed valid multi-validator metadata below configured max.
states.testOnlySeam: Provider-state HTTP endpoint or fixture command in the EventStore submodule

states.name: query-auth-tenant
states.setup: Seed authenticated tenant Tenant_Contract_Case for query adapter.
states.testOnlySeam: Provider-state HTTP endpoint or fixture command in the EventStore submodule
